title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at CarDekho

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at CarDekho
jsonLd.description:
CarDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CarDekho:
CarDekho is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarDekho!
